final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: flat vector illustration, children's educational infographic, cartoon storytelling style with friendly simplified characters
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story illustrated in sequential cartoon panels showing key events: fire attack on linked warships, Zhuge Liang's strategy, wind direction change
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, title at top in bold clear typography, main story illustration occupying center-right, bullet points listed on the left side with punctuation marks
Scene/backdrop: simplified river battle scene with cartoon-style warships, flames, and characters in ancient Chinese armor, clean white or light cream background for readability
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water, earth tones for ships, high contrast for text readability
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: must be readable for children ages 6-10; text and visuals must work together for clear storytelling; card format should be scannable with clear hierarchy
Avoid: realistic violence or gore; overly complex historical details; cluttered layout; small unreadable text; photorealistic rendering
